## Runtime.ChocolateLibrary.addJournal() method

Adds a [journal record](./ts-chocolate.entities.journal.anyfillingjournalentry.md) to the library

**Signature:**

```typescript
addJournal(journal: AnyFillingJournalEntry): Result<JournalId>;
```
